chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 376 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1925/2025. 2. For orders on office objection No.22. 3. For orders on CMA No.1926/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 30.01.2025 None present for the petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2 to 4. This petition seeks orders of this court for appointment in Education & Literacy department on humanitarian grounds. Prima facie, such a writ cannot be issued in exercise of Article 199 of the Constitution. Even otherwise, perusal of memorandum of petition demonstrates no discernable cause for this matter to be adjudicated directly in writ jurisdiction. Petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
